title: Somethings Horribly Wrong with Mari
wikitext:
[]: Something's Horribly Wrong with Mari [Spoilers]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 13, 2009 12:00 am Evidence is here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 13, 2009 12:05 am Second part is funny. The first part is terrifying. @_@

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Sep 13, 2009 12:08 am And like Asuka's perfectly hinged either? But that's what makes all the characters in the series so refreshing. EDIT: Also being smoking hot really doesnt hurt either.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 13, 2009 12:30 am I fav'd it. Very well done. Clever.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:38 pm I LOL'd when I saw this. Really great. Made me chuckle. Chuckle makers deserve praise

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Sep 13, 2009 11:20 pm I love her.She's awsome and has a nice rack .Mari rocks.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 14, 2009 12:39 am "Starwipe. " "Dad, there are more options then just starwipe!" Good jorb thar, hamstray! This made me laugh.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Sep 14, 2009 12:50 am Mari needs to be filled out more......... err............. as a character I mean and shown the joys of "puppy love". ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 14, 2009 1:11 am If that bounce hasn't been reseqenced, then either a) Khara have lost the knack of the Gainax bounce b) those really are a couple of ferrets in a sack

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:00 am That was funny. Reading the comments on the other videos, especially the "Formal Lettter" was depressing, though. Maybe it is a good thing if Evangelion is dumbed down as much as possible. Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: and shown the joys of "puppy love". ;)

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 14, 2009 2:40 pm Everyones saying that this is funny.....I think Im gonna make a reaction vid while Im seeing it.. EDIT http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kuvyjjBt-X4&feature=channel_page

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:39 pm I'm surprised that no one mentioned the fact that her eyes started to glow during the Zeruel battle. That just ain't natural.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:48 pm I read fragments on a Japanese news site of a Tsurumaki interview (I believe it was on Extra-04 or some other Weva document) in which he clearly states, that they started doing 2.0 without actually defining the new chara's name (it was Mariko). And that they continued with production without even defining how that chara was going to be. I remember he said that they had trouble working where to put Mari. All of this makes me believe they started working 2.0 knowing they had to put a *new chara*, they didn't know what type, the name, nothing. They only knew they needed a new chara. Next time it might as well be Hannah Banana or the Jonas Brothers, as Khara seems to be wanting to make Eva more "chic" by the minute.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:51 pm I don't get it. They're just anime boobs, dude.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 14, 2009 4:41 pm AchtungAffen wrote: I read fragments on a Japanese news site of a Tsurumaki interview (I believe it was on Extra-04 or some other Weva document) in which he clearly states, that they started doing 2.0 without actually defining the new chara's name (it was Mariko). And that they continued with production without even defining how that chara was going to be. I remember he said that they had trouble working where to put Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Mon Sep 14, 2009 10:06 pm saw the clip, and it was fucking hilarious. Mari's tits are funny. love the edit! FUCKING GOOD!

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Sep 14, 2009 10:23 pm Depending on how much Mari gets to interact with the other pilots from here on out, having a seemingly very strongly outgoing personality added to the mix could be beneficial. ...not that I really think Anno will ever let the poor wretches have a good end :(

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:00 pm esselfortium wrote: ...not that I really think Anno will ever let the poor wretches have a good end :(

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:02 pm Eh? Did you forget the glimpses of Asuka, dead Misato, and dead Ritsuko in EoTV that hint (pretty clearly, IMO) that EoTV events = EoE events from another perspective?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:46 pm Did you forget that everyone come back if they want to and thus the only people dead are the ones voluntarily remaining so?
